summary: Tested all 7 APS corrections: (1) Page 'Matrice Compat.' removed from navigation and route, (2) Gantt filters for order_id and article_id working, (3) Full French date format 'Mercredi 18 mars 2026' displayed in Gantt timeline, (4) Date range selectors (Du/Au) present and functional, (5) Machine unavailabilities page and constraint system implemented, (6) Europe/Paris timezone used for scheduling_start, (7) JIT mode with flux tiré for minimizing encours available.
seed_data_creation: Used existing scenario: a8295933-c58d-4177-bbdb-76d3ce654012 (Test corrections v1, JIT, OPTIMAL)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 corrections from APS application verified. Scenario a8295933-c58d-4177-bbdb-76d3ce654012 can be used for regression testing.

tests: Navigation sidebar does NOT contain 'Matrice' link
/matrix route shows blank page (route removed from React Router)
/api/matrix endpoint returns 404

2_gantt_filters_order_article.description: Filtres Gantt par order_id et article_id
tests: Order filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-order-select') displays OF1, OF2, OF3
Article filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-article-select') available
Filtering by OF1 shows '2 opérations affichées' and filters gantt view
Reset filters button works
Gantt timeline header shows 'Mercredi 18 mars 2026' format
formatFullDate() function in GanttInteractive.js uses French day/month names
Date range start input (data-testid='date-range-start') present
Date range end input (data-testid='date-range-end') present
Labels 'Du' and 'Au' displayed
Indisponibilités page accessible from navigation
CRUD operations on unavailability records work
UnavailabilityManager class handles constraints in scheduler_engine.py
Existing unavailability: TP5000_2 16-19/03/2026 'Maintenance préventive annuelle'
PARIS_TZ = ZoneInfo('Europe/Paris') in scheduler_engine.py line 15
datetime.now(PARIS_TZ) used for scheduling_start
scheduling_start in scenario data shows correct format

7_jit_mode_flux_tire.description: Mode JIT amélioré avec flux tiré (minimiser encours)
tests: Scheduling page shows 'Au plus tard (Juste-à-temps)' option
JIT advantage text: 'Limite les encours, réduit les entrées en stock anticipées'
JIT scenario returns OPTIMAL status
encours_vars for wait time minimization in scheduler_engine.py

implementation_notes.matrix_removal: Route removed from App.js, link removed from Layout.js
implementation_notes.gantt_filters: filterOrderId, filterArticleId state variables with useMemo for filtering
implementation_notes.date_format: formatFullDate() uses French day/month arrays for 'Lundi 16 mars 2026' format
implementation_notes.unavailability: UnavailabilityManager class creates constraints to avoid scheduling during unavailable periods
implementation_notes.timezone: PARIS_TZ = ZoneInfo('Europe/Paris') for consistent scheduling times
implementation_notes.jit_flux_tire: encours_vars minimize wait time between operations of same OF
